1: // Phase 3: Core Melee Combat AI вҖ” Melee Attack Loop & Jump Criticals
2: package com.khoablabla.pvpbot.combat;
3: 
4: import net.citizensnpcs.api.npc.NPC;
5: 
6: import org.bukkit.Location;
7: import org.bukkit.Particle;
8: import org.bukkit.entity.LivingEntity;
9: import org.bukkit.entity.Player;
10: import org.bukkit.util.Vector;
11: 
12: public class MeleeAttackController {
13: 
14:     private int cooldownTicks = 0;
15:     private boolean jumpTriggered = false;
16:     private boolean criticalsEnabled = true;
17: 
18:     private static final double ATTACK_RANGE = 3.0;
19:     private static final double JUMP_VELOCITY = 0.42;
20:     private static final int SWORD_COOLDOWN = 12;
21:     private static final double NORMAL_DAMAGE = 2.0;
22:     private static final double CRITICAL_DAMAGE = 4.0;
23: 
24:     public void handleAttack(NPC npc, LivingEntity target) {
25:         if (cooldownTicks > 0) cooldownTicks--;
26: 
27:         if (!(npc.getEntity() instanceof Player botPlayer)) return;
28: 
29:         double dist = botPlayer.getLocation().distance(target.getLocation());
30: 
31:         if (dist > ATTACK_RANGE) {
32:             jumpTriggered = false;
33:             return;
34:         }
35: 
36:         if (cooldownTicks > 0) return;
37: 
38:         if (criticalsEnabled) {
39:             if (!jumpTriggered) {
40:                 botPlayer.setVelocity(new Vector(0, JUMP_VELOCITY, 0));
41:                 jumpTriggered = true;
42:             }
43:             if (botPlayer.getVelocity().getY() < 0) {
44:                 executeStrike(botPlayer, target, true);
45:                 jumpTriggered = false;
46:                 cooldownTicks = SWORD_COOLDOWN;
47:             }
48:         } else {
49:             executeStrike(botPlayer, target, false);
50:             cooldownTicks = SWORD_COOLDOWN;
51:         }
52:     }
53: 
54:     private void executeStrike(Player botPlayer, LivingEntity target, boolean critical) {
55:         Location targetLoc = target.getLocation().add(0, 1, 0);
56:         if (critical) {
57:             target.getWorld().spawnParticle(Particle.CRIT, targetLoc, 15, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.1);
58:         }
59:         botPlayer.swingMainHand();
60:         target.damage(critical ? CRITICAL_DAMAGE : NORMAL_DAMAGE, botPlayer);
61:     }
62: }

(End of file - total 62 lines)
</content>

1: // Phase 3: Core Melee Combat AI вҖ” Pursuit Navigation & Bunny Hop
2: package com.khoablabla.pvpbot.movement;
3: 
4: import net.citizensnpcs.api.npc.NPC;

11: public class BotMovementController {
12: 
13:     private int lastBHopTick = 0;
14: 
15:     public void handleMovement(NPC npc, LivingEntity target, int currentTick) {
16:         if (npc.getEntity() == null) return;
17: 
18:         npc.getNavigator().setTarget(target, true);
19: 
20:         if (!(npc.getEntity() instanceof Player botPlayer)) return;
21:         if (currentTick - lastBHopTick < 20) return;
22:         lastBHopTick = currentTick;
23: 
24:         if (botPlayer.getLocation().distance(target.getLocation()) <= 5.0) return;
25: 
26:         Location below = botPlayer.getLocation().subtract(0, 0.01, 0);
27:         if (below.getBlock().isSolid()) {
28:             botPlayer.setVelocity(new Vector(0, 0.42, 0));
29:         }
30:     }
31: }

1: // Phase 3: Core Melee Combat AI вҖ” Target Selector
2: package com.khoablabla.pvpbot.combat;
3: 
4: import net.citizensnpcs.api.npc.NPC;
5: 
6: import org.bukkit.GameMode;
7: import org.bukkit.Location;
8: import org.bukkit.entity.Entity;
9: import org.bukkit.entity.LivingEntity;
10: import org.bukkit.entity.Player;
11: import org.bukkit.scoreboard.Team;
12: 
13: import java.util.Comparator;
14: 
15: public final class CombatTargetSelector {
16: 
17:     private CombatTargetSelector() {
18:     }
19: 
20:     public static LivingEntity findTarget(NPC npc, double range) {
21:         if (!(npc.getEntity() instanceof LivingEntity botEntity)) return null;
22: 
23:         Location botLoc = botEntity.getLocation();
24:         return botEntity.getNearbyEntities(range, range, range).stream()
25:             .filter(e -> e instanceof LivingEntity le && !le.isDead() && !e.equals(botEntity))
26:             .filter(e -> {
27:                 if (!(e instanceof Player p)) return true;
28:                 GameMode gm = p.getGameMode();
29:                 return gm == GameMode.SURVIVAL || gm == GameMode.ADVENTURE;
30:             })
31:             .filter(e -> {
32:                 if (!(e instanceof Player targetPlayer) || !(botEntity instanceof Player botPlayer)) return true;
33:                 Team botTeam = botPlayer.getScoreboard().getEntityTeam(botPlayer);
34:                 Team targetTeam = botPlayer.getScoreboard().getEntityTeam(targetPlayer);
35:                 return botTeam == null || !botTeam.equals(targetTeam);
36:             })
37:             .map(e -> (LivingEntity) e)
38:             .filter(e -> e.getLocation().distanceSquared(botLoc) <= range * range)
39:             .min(Comparator.comparingDouble(e -> e.getLocation().distanceSquared(botLoc)))
40:             .orElse(null);
41:     }
42: }

(End of file - total 42 lines)
</content>

1: // Phase 3: Core Melee Combat AI вҖ” Pursuit Navigation & Bunny Hop
2: package com.khoablabla.pvpbot.movement;
3: 
4: import net.citizensnpcs.api.npc.NPC;
5: 
6: import org.bukkit.Location;
7: import org.bukkit.entity.LivingEntity;
8: import org.bukkit.entity.Player;
9: import org.bukkit.util.Vector;
10: 
11: public class BotMovementController {
12: 
13:     private int lastBHopTick = 0;
14: 
15:     public void handleMovement(NPC npc, LivingEntity target, int currentTick) {
16:         if (npc.getEntity() == null) return;
17: 
18:         npc.getNavigator().setTarget(target, true);
19: 
20:         if (!(npc.getEntity() instanceof Player botPlayer)) return;
21:         if (currentTick - lastBHopTick < 20) return;
22:         lastBHopTick = currentTick;
23: 
24:         if (botPlayer.getLocation().distance(target.getLocation()) <= 5.0) return;
25: 
26:         Location below = botPlayer.getLocation().subtract(0, 0.01, 0);
27:         if (below.getBlock().isSolid()) {
28:             botPlayer.setVelocity(new Vector(0, 0.42, 0));
29:         }
30:     }
31: }

1: // Phase 3: Core Melee Combat AI вҖ” Melee Attack Loop & Jump Criticals
2: package com.khoablabla.pvpbot.combat;
3: 
4: import net.citizensnpcs.api.npc.NPC;
5: 
6: import org.bukkit.Location;
7: import org.bukkit.Particle;
8: import org.bukkit.entity.LivingEntity;
9: import org.bukkit.entity.Player;
10: import org.bukkit.util.Vector;
11: 
12: public class MeleeAttackController {
13: 
14:     private int cooldownTicks = 0;
15:     private boolean jumpTriggered = false;
16:     private boolean criticalsEnabled = true;
17: 
18:     private static final double ATTACK_RANGE = 3.0;
19:     private static final double JUMP_VELOCITY = 0.42;
20:     private static final int SWORD_COOLDOWN = 12;
21:     private static final double NORMAL_DAMAGE = 2.0;
22:     private static final double CRITICAL_DAMAGE = 4.0;
23: 
24:     public void handleAttack(NPC npc, LivingEntity target) {
25:         if (cooldownTicks > 0) cooldownTicks--;
26: 
27:         if (!(npc.getEntity() instanceof Player botPlayer)) return;
28: 
29:         double dist = botPlayer.getLocation().distance(target.getLocation());
30: 
31:         if (dist > ATTACK_RANGE) {
32:             jumpTriggered = false;
33:             return;
34:         }
35: 
36:         if (cooldownTicks > 0) return;
37: 
38:         if (criticalsEnabled) {
39:             if (!jumpTriggered) {
40:                 botPlayer.setVelocity(new Vector(0, JUMP_VELOCITY, 0));
41:                 jumpTriggered = true;
42:             }
43:             if (botPlayer.getVelocity().getY() < 0) {
44:                 executeStrike(botPlayer, target, true);
45:                 jumpTriggered = false;
46:                 cooldownTicks = SWORD_COOLDOWN;
47:             }
48:         } else {
49:             executeStrike(botPlayer, target, false);
50:             cooldownTicks = SWORD_COOLDOWN;
51:         }
52:     }
53: 
54:     private void executeStrike(Player botPlayer, LivingEntity target, boolean critical) {
55:         Location targetLoc = target.getLocation().add(0, 1, 0);
56:         if (critical) {
57:             target.getWorld().spawnParticle(Particle.CRIT, targetLoc, 15, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.1);
58:         }
59:         botPlayer.swingMainHand();
60:         target.damage(critical ? CRITICAL_DAMAGE : NORMAL_DAMAGE, botPlayer);
61:     }
62: }

</content>

# TASK DIRECTIVE: PHASE 3.1 вҖ” QUALITY AUDITING FOR NATURAL COMBAT, VELOCITY SMOOTHING & RETENTION

## 1. Objective
Your objective is to audit the Phase 3.1 natural simulation and combat safety patches implemented by Agent A2. You must compile the project, run safety validation scans, verify that the 23 deep-audit warnings (specifically the auto-target removal, velocity momentum, and respawn message deduplication) are cleared, and write a Vietnamese UAT guide.

## 2. Strict Report.md Discipline (Iron Rule)
- **Do NOT delete or overwrite any previous bugs/checklists in `report.md`** [2].
- If an old bug is verified as solved, tick it as `[x]`. If a new bug is found, append it below [2].

## 3. Auditing Requirements & Procedure
1. Confirm that Agent A2 has populated Sections 1, 2, and 3 of `report.md` without wiping the historical checklist.
2. Inspect `PlayerSimulationListener.java`, `PvPBotTrait.java`, `BotMovementController.java`, `MeleeAttackController.java`, and `CombatTargetSelector.java`.
3. Verify:
   - Target auto-scan is removed from `CombatTargetSelector`.
   - `EntityDamageByEntityEvent` is registered and correctly sets the attacker as the bot's target [1.1.2].
   - Velocity updates preserve horizontal components: `Vector(currentVel.getX(), 0.42, currentVel.getZ())`.
   - Jump crits only execute if block below is solid.
   - Join message is removed from `onNPCSpawn` and exists only in initial spawn commands [1.1.1].
   - Idle wander occurs every 100 ticks when target is null [1.1.1].
4. Execute `./build.sh` on the workspace to verify compilation is clean.
5. **DO NOT edit any Java files yourself.** Your role is strictly read-only for production code [2].
6. Populate Section 4 (DEBUG) in `report.md`.
7. **Rewrite Section 5 (HЖҜб»ҡNG DбәӘN KIб»ӮM THб»¬) in Vietnamese** using the exact simple step-by-step format:
   - **BЖ°б»ӣc 1: CГ i Д‘бә·t & Khб»ҹi Д‘б»ҷng** (Copy file JAR, reload/restart server).
   - **BЖ°б»ӣc 2: Kiб»ғm thб»ӯ trong game (GГө lб»Үnh theo trГ¬nh tб»ұ)**:
     1. GГө `/pvpbot spawn` -> XГЎc nhбәӯn: CГі tin nhбәҜn mГ u vГ ng bГЎo join duy nhбәҘt 1 lбә§n. Bot Д‘б»©ng im hoГ n toГ n, khГҙng tбәҘn cГҙng bбәЎn dГ№ bбәЎn Д‘б»©ng sГЎt cбәЎnh (Revenge AI hoбәЎt Д‘б»ҷng). NhбәҘn TAB thбәҘy tГӘn bot trГӘn Tablist.
     2. Дҗб»©ng nhГ¬n bot -> XГЎc nhбәӯn: Cб»© mб»—i 5 giГўy, bot tб»ұ Д‘б»ҷng Д‘i dбәЎo xung quanh mб»ҷt vГ i bЖ°б»ӣc rбәҘt tб»ұ nhiГӘn (Wander AI hoбәЎt Д‘б»ҷng), khГҙng bб»Ӣ Д‘Гіng bДғng mб»ҷt chб»—.
     3. TбәҘn cГҙng bot 1 hit -> XГЎc nhбәӯn: Bot lбәӯp tб»©c khГіa bбәЎn lГ m mб»Ҙc tiГӘu, nhбәЈy B-hop mЖ°б»Јt mГ  khГҙng bб»Ӣ khб»ұng, nhбәЈy chГ©m crit vб»Ў bб»Ҙi vГ ng chГўn thб»ұc.
     4. ChбәЎy ra xa quГЎ 16 blocks -> XГЎc nhбәӯn: Bot ngб»«ng Д‘uб»•i, tб»ұ xГіa mб»Ҙc tiГӘu sau thб»қi gian timeout vГ  tiбәҝp tб»Ҙc Д‘i dбәЎo hГІa bГ¬nh.
     5. ДҗГЎnh chбәҝt bot -> XГЎc nhбәӯn: CГі tin nhбәҜn tб»ӯ trбәӯn mГ u Д‘б»Ҹ. ДҗГәng 0.5 giГўy sau, bot tб»ұ hб»“i sinh tбәЎi Д‘iб»ғm spawn thбәҝ giб»ӣi vГ  KHГ”NG phГЎt lбәЎi tin nhбәҜn mГ u vГ ng "joined the game" (chб»ү join 1 lбә§n duy nhбәҘt).
8. Complete Section 7 (Tб»”NG QUAN) and set the completion rate to **100%** if compile passes clean with zero errors.
Let me start by reading the current report.md to understand the current state, then inspect the relevant Java files to verify the Phase 3.1 changes.

1: // Phase 2.4: Real Player Join, Leave, Death Announcements & 10-tick Respawn Loop
2: package com.khoablabla.pvpbot.listeners;
3: 
4: import net.citizensnpcs.api.CitizensAPI;
5: import net.citizensnpcs.api.event.NPCDeathEvent;
6: import net.citizensnpcs.api.event.NPCSpawnEvent;
7: import net.citizensnpcs.api.npc.NPC;
8: import org.bukkit.Bukkit;
9: import org.bukkit.Location;
10: import org.bukkit.attribute.Attribute;
11: import org.bukkit.attribute.AttributeInstance;
12: import org.bukkit.entity.EntityType;
13: import org.bukkit.entity.Player;
14: import org.bukkit.event.EventHandler;
15: import org.bukkit.event.Listener;
16: import org.bukkit.event.entity.EntityDamageByEntityEvent;
17: import org.bukkit.event.entity.EntityDeathEvent;
18: import org.bukkit.event.player.PlayerJoinEvent;
19: import org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin;
20: import org.bukkit.scheduler.BukkitRunnable;
21: 
22: import com.khoablabla.pvpbot.traits.PvPBotTrait;
23: 
24: import java.util.HashMap;
25: import java.util.Map;
26: 
27: public class PlayerSimulationListener implements Listener {
28: 
29:     private final JavaPlugin plugin;
30:     private final Map<Integer, Location> spawnLocations = new HashMap<>();
31: 
32:     public PlayerSimulationListener(JavaPlugin plugin) {
33:         this.plugin = plugin;
34:     }
35: 
36:     @EventHandler
37:     public void onNPCSpawn(NPCSpawnEvent event) {
38:         NPC npc = event.getNPC();
39:         if (!npc.hasTrait(PvPBotTrait.class)) return;
40:         if (!(npc.getEntity() instanceof Player botPlayer)) return;
41: 
42:         spawnLocations.putIfAbsent(npc.getId(), botPlayer.getLocation().clone());
43: 
44:         for (Player online : Bukkit.getOnlinePlayers()) {
45:             online.showPlayer(plugin, botPlayer);
46:         }
47:     }
48: 
49:     @EventHandler
50:     public void onPlayerJoin(PlayerJoinEvent event) {
51:         Player joiner = event.getPlayer();
52: 
53:         for (NPC npc : net.citizensnpcs.api.CitizensAPI.getNPCRegistry()) {
54:             if (npc.hasTrait(PvPBotTrait.class) && npc.isSpawned()
55:                     && npc.getEntity() instanceof Player botPlayer) {
56:                 joiner.showPlayer(plugin, botPlayer);
57:             }
58:         }
59:     }
60: 
61:     @EventHandler
62:     public void onNPCDeath(NPCDeathEvent event) {
63:         NPC npc = event.getNPC();
64:         if (!npc.hasTrait(PvPBotTrait.class)) return;
65: 
66:         EntityDeathEvent bukkitEvent = event.getEvent();
67:         String botName = npc.getName();
68: 
69:         Location respawnLocation = spawnLocations.remove(npc.getId());
70:         if (respawnLocation == null || respawnLocation.getWorld() == null) {
71:             Location storedLocation = npc.getStoredLocation();
72:             respawnLocation = storedLocation == null ? null : storedLocation.clone();
73:         }
74:         if (respawnLocation == null || respawnLocation.getWorld() == null) {
75:             respawnLocation = bukkitEvent.getEntity().getLocation().clone();
76:         }
77: 
78:         if (respawnLocation == null || respawnLocation.getWorld() == null) {
79:             plugin.getLogger().warning("Cannot respawn " + botName + " (ID: " + npc.getId()
80:                     + "): no valid death or stored location.");
81:             npc.destroy();
82:             return;
83:         }
84: 
85:         int oldId = npc.getId();
86:         npc.destroy();
87: 
88:         final Location finalLoc = respawnLocation;
89:         new BukkitRunnable() {
90:             @Override
91:             public void run() {
92:                 NPC replacement = CitizensAPI.getNPCRegistry().createNPC(EntityType.PLAYER, botName);
93:                 replacement.data().set(NPC.Metadata.REMOVE_FROM_PLAYERLIST, false);
94:                 replacement.data().set(NPC.Metadata.REMOVE_FROM_TABLIST, false);
95:                 replacement.data().set(NPC.Metadata.NAMEPLATE_VISIBLE, true);
96:                 replacement.addTrait(PvPBotTrait.class);
97: 
98:                 boolean spawned = replacement.spawn(finalLoc);
99:                 if (!spawned) {
100:                     plugin.getLogger().warning("Failed to respawn " + botName + " after death. Old NPC ID: "
101:                             + oldId + ", new NPC ID: " + replacement.getId() + ", location: "
102:                             + formatLocation(finalLoc));
103:                     replacement.destroy();
104:                     return;
105:                 }
106: 
107:                 if (replacement.getEntity() instanceof Player player) {
108:                     AttributeInstance maxHealth = player.getAttribute(Attribute.MAX_HEALTH);
109:                     if (maxHealth != null) {
110:                         player.setHealth(maxHealth.getValue());
111:                     }
112:                     player.setFoodLevel(20);
113:                     player.setFireTicks(0);
114:                     player.setFallDistance(0.0F);
115:                     player.setNoDamageTicks(10);
116:                 }
117: 
118:             }
119:         }.runTaskLater(plugin, 10);
120:     }
121: 
122:     @EventHandler
123:     public void onEntityDamageByEntity(EntityDamageByEntityEvent event) {
124:         if (!(event.getDamager() instanceof Player attacker)) return;
125:         if (!CitizensAPI.getNPCRegistry().isNPC(event.getEntity())) return;
126:         NPC npc = CitizensAPI.getNPCRegistry().getNPC(event.getEntity());
127:         if (!npc.hasTrait(PvPBotTrait.class)) return;
128: 
129:         PvPBotTrait trait = npc.getTraitNullable(PvPBotTrait.class);
130:         if (trait != null) {
131:             trait.setTarget(attacker);
132:         }
133:     }
134: 
135:     private String formatLocation(Location location) {
136:         return location.getWorld().getName() + " "
137:                 + location.getBlockX() + ","
138:                 + location.getBlockY() + ","
139:                 + location.getBlockZ();
140:     }
141: }

1: // Phase 3: Core Melee Combat AI вҖ” Revenge-Only Target Validation
2: package com.khoablabla.pvpbot.combat;
3: 
4: import net.citizensnpcs.api.npc.NPC;
5: 
6: import org.bukkit.Location;
7: import org.bukkit.entity.LivingEntity;
8: 
9: public final class CombatTargetSelector {
10: 
11:     private CombatTargetSelector() {
12:     }
13: 
14:     public static LivingEntity validateTarget(NPC npc, double range, LivingEntity currentTarget, int tickCounter, int lastDamageTick) {
15:         if (currentTarget == null) return null;
16:         if (currentTarget.isDead() || !currentTarget.isValid()) return null;
17:         if (!(npc.getEntity() instanceof LivingEntity botEntity)) return null;
18: 
19:         double distSq = botEntity.getLocation().distanceSquared(currentTarget.getLocation());
20:         if (distSq > range * range) return null;
21: 
22:         double meleeRangeSq = 3.0 * 3.0;
23:         if (tickCounter - lastDamageTick > 200 && distSq > meleeRangeSq) return null;
24: 
25:         return currentTarget;
26:     }
27: }

1: // Phase 1: Citizens Trait Base Lifecycle
2: // Phase 2: Tablist & Player Simulation
3: // Phase 3: Core Melee Combat AI Integration
4: package com.khoablabla.pvpbot.traits;

13: import com.khoablabla.pvpbot.PvPBot;

15: import com.khoablabla.pvpbot.combat.MeleeAttackController;
16: import com.khoablabla.pvpbot.movement.BotMovementController;
17: 
18: public class PvPBotTrait extends Trait {
19: 
20:     private int tickCounter = 0;
21:     private int idleTickCounter = 0;
22:     private int lastDamageTick = 0;
23:     private LivingEntity target = null;
24:     private final BotMovementController movementController = new BotMovementController();
25:     private final MeleeAttackController attackController = new MeleeAttackController();
26:     private static final double TARGET_RANGE = 16.0;
27: 
28:     public PvPBotTrait() {
29:         super("pvpbot");
30:     }
31: 
32:     public void setTarget(LivingEntity newTarget) {
33:         this.target = newTarget;
34:         if (newTarget != null) {
35:             lastDamageTick = tickCounter;
36:         }
37:     }
38: 
39:     @Override
40:     public void onAttach() {
41:         if (npc.getEntity() instanceof Player) {
42:             JavaPlugin plugin = JavaPlugin.getPlugin(PvPBot.class);
43:             plugin.getLogger().info("PvPBotTrait attached to NPC " + npc.getName() + " (ID: " + npc.getId() + ")");
44:         } else if (npc.getEntity() != null) {
45:             JavaPlugin plugin = JavaPlugin.getPlugin(PvPBot.class);
46:             plugin.getLogger().warning("PvPBotTrait attached to NPC " + npc.getName()
47:                     + " (ID: " + npc.getId() + ") but its entity is not a Player вҖ” PvP functionality may be limited.");
48:         }
49:     }
50: 
51:     @Override
52:     public void onSpawn() {
53:         if (npc.getEntity() instanceof Player player) {
54:             npc.setProtected(false);
55:             npc.data().set(NPC.Metadata.DAMAGE_OTHERS, true);
56: 
57:             JavaPlugin plugin = JavaPlugin.getPlugin(PvPBot.class);
58:             plugin.getLogger().info("PvPBot NPC '" + npc.getName() + "' (ID: " + npc.getId()
59:                     + ") has spawned in world: " + player.getWorld().getName());
60:         }
61:     }
62: 
63:     @Override
64:     public void onDespawn() {
65:         JavaPlugin plugin = JavaPlugin.getPlugin(PvPBot.class);
66:         plugin.getLogger().info("PvPBot NPC (ID: " + npc.getId() + ") has despawned from world.");
67:     }
68: 
69:     @Override
70:     public void run() {
71:         tickCounter++;
72: 
73:         if (tickCounter % 10 == 0) {
74:             target = CombatTargetSelector.validateTarget(npc, TARGET_RANGE, target, tickCounter, lastDamageTick);
75:         }
76: 
77:         if (target != null && !target.isDead() && target.isValid()) {
78:             movementController.handleMovement(npc, target, tickCounter);
79:             attackController.handleAttack(npc, target);
80:             idleTickCounter = 0;
81:         } else {
82:             target = null;
83:             npc.getNavigator().cancelNavigation();
84: 
85:             idleTickCounter++;
86:             if (idleTickCounter >= 100) {
87:                 idleTickCounter = 0;
88:                 movementController.handleIdleWander(npc);
89:             }
90:         }
91:     }
92: }

1: // Phase 3: Core Melee Combat AI вҖ” Pursuit Navigation, Bunny Hop & Idle Wander
2: package com.khoablabla.pvpbot.movement;
3: 
4: import net.citizensnpcs.api.npc.NPC;
5: 
6: import org.bukkit.Location;
7: import org.bukkit.entity.LivingEntity;
8: import org.bukkit.entity.Player;
9: import org.bukkit.util.Vector;
10: 
11: import com.khoablabla.pvpbot.utils.SafeLocationFinder;
12: 
13: import java.util.Random;
14: 
15: public class BotMovementController {
16: 
17:     private int lastBHopTick = 0;
18:     private final Random random = new Random();
19: 
20:     public void handleMovement(NPC npc, LivingEntity target, int currentTick) {
21:         if (npc.getEntity() == null) return;
22: 
23:         npc.getNavigator().setTarget(target, true);
24: 
25:         if (!(npc.getEntity() instanceof Player botPlayer)) return;
26:         if (currentTick - lastBHopTick < 20) return;
27:         lastBHopTick = currentTick;
28: 
29:         if (botPlayer.getLocation().distance(target.getLocation()) <= 5.0) return;
30: 
31:         Location below = botPlayer.getLocation().subtract(0, 0.01, 0);
32:         if (below.getBlock().isSolid()) {
33:             Vector currentVel = botPlayer.getVelocity();
34:             botPlayer.setVelocity(new Vector(currentVel.getX(), 0.42, currentVel.getZ()));
35:         }
36:     }
37: 
38:     public void handleIdleWander(NPC npc) {
39:         if (!(npc.getEntity() instanceof Player botPlayer)) return;
40:         if (npc.getNavigator().isNavigating()) return;
41: 
42:         Location origin = botPlayer.getLocation();
43:         for (int attempt = 0; attempt < 5; attempt++) {
44:             double dx = (random.nextDouble() - 0.5) * 10;
45:             double dz = (random.nextDouble() - 0.5) * 10;
46:             Location candidate = origin.clone().add(dx, 0, dz);
47:             Location safe = SafeLocationFinder.findSafeLocation(candidate);
48:             if (safe != null) {
49:                 npc.getNavigator().setTarget(safe);
50:                 return;
51:             }
52:         }
53:     }
54: }

(End of file - total 54 lines)
</content>

<content>
1: // Phase 3: Core Melee Combat AI вҖ” Melee Attack Loop & Jump Criticals
2: package com.khoablabla.pvpbot.combat;
3: 
4: import net.citizensnpcs.api.npc.NPC;
5: 
6: import org.bukkit.Location;
7: import org.bukkit.Particle;
8: import org.bukkit.entity.LivingEntity;
9: import org.bukkit.entity.Player;
10: import org.bukkit.util.Vector;
11: 
12: public class MeleeAttackController {
13: 
14:     private int cooldownTicks = 0;
15:     private boolean jumpTriggered = false;
16:     private boolean criticalsEnabled = true;
17: 
18:     private static final double ATTACK_RANGE = 3.0;
19:     private static final double JUMP_VELOCITY = 0.42;
20:     private static final int SWORD_COOLDOWN = 12;
21:     private static final double NORMAL_DAMAGE = 2.0;
22:     private static final double CRITICAL_DAMAGE = 4.0;
23: 
24:     public void handleAttack(NPC npc, LivingEntity target) {
25:         if (cooldownTicks > 0) cooldownTicks--;
26: 
27:         if (!(npc.getEntity() instanceof Player botPlayer)) return;
28: 
29:         double dist = botPlayer.getLocation().distance(target.getLocation());
30: 
31:         if (dist > ATTACK_RANGE) {
32:             jumpTriggered = false;
33:             return;
34:         }
35: 
36:         if (cooldownTicks > 0) return;
37: 
38:         if (criticalsEnabled) {
39:             if (!jumpTriggered) {
40:                 Location below = botPlayer.getLocation().subtract(0, 0.01, 0);
41:                 if (!below.getBlock().isSolid()) return;
42:                 Vector currentVel = botPlayer.getVelocity();
43:                 botPlayer.setVelocity(new Vector(currentVel.getX(), JUMP_VELOCITY, currentVel.getZ()));
44:                 jumpTriggered = true;
45:             }
46:             if (botPlayer.getVelocity().getY() < 0) {
47:                 executeStrike(botPlayer, target, true);
48:                 jumpTriggered = false;
49:                 cooldownTicks = SWORD_COOLDOWN;
50:             }
51:         } else {
52:             executeStrike(botPlayer, target, false);
53:             cooldownTicks = SWORD_COOLDOWN;
54:         }
55:     }
56: 
57:     private void executeStrike(Player botPlayer, LivingEntity target, boolean critical) {
58:         Location targetLoc = target.getLocation().add(0, 1, 0);
59:         if (critical) {
60:             target.getWorld().spawnParticle(Particle.CRIT, targetLoc, 15, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.1);
61:         }
62:         botPlayer.swingMainHand();
63:         target.damage(critical ? CRITICAL_DAMAGE : NORMAL_DAMAGE, botPlayer);
64:     }
65: }

(End of file - total 65 lines)
</content>

# TASK DIRECTIVE: PHASE 3.2 вҖ” QUALITY AUDITING FOR JUMP STATE MACHINE, GAMEMODE SAFETIES & RETENTION

## 1. Objective
Your objective is to audit the Phase 3.2 physical realism patches implemented by Agent A2. You must compile the project, run safety validation scans, verify that the critical jump tick state machine and GameMode filters are fully functional, and completely rewrite Section 5 (HЖҜб»ҡNG DбәӘN KIб»ӮM THб»¬) in very simple, step-by-step Vietnamese.

## 2. Strict Report.md Discipline (Iron Rule)
- **Do NOT delete or overwrite any previous bugs/checklists in `report.md`** [2].
- If an old bug is verified as solved, tick it as `[x]`. If a new bug is found, append it below [2].

## 3. Auditing Requirements & Procedure
1. Confirm that Agent A2 has populated Sections 1, 2, and 3 of `report.md` without wiping the historical checklist.
2. Inspect `PlayerSimulationListener.java`, `PvPBotTrait.java`, `BotMovementController.java`, and `MeleeAttackController.java`.
3. Verify:
   - `EntityDamageByEntityEvent` verifies the attacker's GameMode is not Creative or Spectator [1.1.1, 1.1.2].
   - Target validation in `PvPBotTrait.java` clears the target if they switch to Creative/Spectator [1.1.1, 1.1.2].
   - `MeleeAttackController` implements the `jumpTicks` state machine, canceling Citizens navigation on jump start, and resetting it on jump landing [1.1.2].
   - `BotMovementController` does not set Navigator targets when a jump is active.
4. Execute `./build.sh` on the workspace to verify compilation is clean.
5. **DO NOT edit any Java files yourself.** Your role is strictly read-only for production code [2].
6. Populate Section 4 (DEBUG) in `report.md`.
7. **Rewrite Section 5 (HЖҜб»ҡNG DбәӘN KIб»ӮM THб»¬) in Vietnamese** using the exact simple step-by-step format:
   - **BЖ°б»ӣc 1: CГ i Д‘бә·t & Khб»ҹi Д‘б»ҷng** (Copy file JAR, reload/restart server).
   - **BЖ°б»ӣc 2: Kiб»ғm thб»ӯ trong game (GГө lб»Үnh theo trГ¬nh tб»ұ)**:
     1. GГө `/pvpbot spawn` -> XГЎc nhбәӯn: CГі tin nhбәҜn mГ u vГ ng bГЎo join. NhбәҘn TAB thбәҘy tГӘn bot trГӘn Tablist.
     2. Дҗб»•i sang chбәҝ Д‘б»ҷ SГЎng tбәЎo (`/gamemode creative`) vГ  bay lбәЎi gбә§n bot, chГ©m bot -> XГЎc nhбәӯn: Bot hoГ n toГ n KHГ”NG truy Д‘uб»•i hay chГ©m trбәЈ bбәЎn (MГ ng lб»Қc Creative hoбәЎt Д‘б»ҷng).
     3. Дҗб»•i sang chбәҝ Д‘б»ҷ Sinh tб»“n (`/gamemode survival`) vГ  chГ©m bot -> XГЎc nhбәӯn: Bot lбәӯp tб»©c Д‘uб»•i theo chГ©m bбәЎn.
     4. Khi bot Д‘uб»•i chГ©m bбәЎn -> Quan sГЎt kб»№ cГә nhбәЈy cб»§a bot: Bot nhбәЈy lГӘn ГЎp sГЎt mЖ°б»Јt mГ  khГҙng bб»Ӣ khб»ұng, vГ  cГә nhбәЈy Crit bб»• xuб»‘ng chГ©m bбәЎn rЖЎi xuб»‘ng Д‘бәҘt vГҙ cГ№ng tб»ұ nhiГӘn, KHГ”NG bao giб»қ bб»Ӣ kбә№t lЖЎ lб»ӯng giб»Ҝa trб»қi hб»Үt nhЖ° trong video lб»—i trЖ°б»ӣc (Jump State Machine hoбәЎt Д‘б»ҷng).
     5. Дҗб»•i nhanh sang chбәҝ Д‘б»ҷ SГЎng tбәЎo (`/gamemode creative`) khi Д‘ang bб»Ӣ bot Д‘uб»•i chГ©m -> XГЎc nhбәӯn: Bot lбәӯp tб»©c dб»«ng truy Д‘uб»•i, Д‘б»©ng im hoбә·c Д‘i dбәЎo hГІa bГ¬nh (Wander AI), khГҙng bГЎm Д‘uб»•i bбәЎn nб»Ҝa.
8. Complete Section 7 (Tб»”NG QUAN) and set the completion rate to **100%** if compile passes clean with zero errors.

27: 
28: public class PlayerSimulationListener implements Listener {
29: 
30:     private final JavaPlugin plugin;
31:     private final Map<Integer, Location> spawnLocations = new HashMap<>();
32: 
33:     public PlayerSimulationListener(JavaPlugin plugin) {
34:         this.plugin = plugin;
35:     }
36: 
37:     @EventHandler
38:     public void onNPCSpawn(NPCSpawnEvent event) {
39:         NPC npc = event.getNPC();
40:         if (!npc.hasTrait(PvPBotTrait.class)) return;
41:         if (!(npc.getEntity() instanceof Player botPlayer)) return;
42: 
43:         spawnLocations.putIfAbsent(npc.getId(), botPlayer.getLocation().clone());
44: 
45:         for (Player online : Bukkit.getOnlinePlayers()) {
46:             online.showPlayer(plugin, botPlayer);
47:         }
48:     }
49: 
50:     @EventHandler
51:     public void onPlayerJoin(PlayerJoinEvent event) {
52:         Player joiner = event.getPlayer();
53: 
54:         for (NPC npc : net.citizensnpcs.api.CitizensAPI.getNPCRegistry()) {
55:             if (npc.hasTrait(PvPBotTrait.class) && npc.isSpawned()
56:                     && npc.getEntity() instanceof Player botPlayer) {
57:                 joiner.showPlayer(plugin, botPlayer);
58:             }
59:         }
60:     }
61: 
62:     @EventHandler
63:     public void onNPCDeath(NPCDeathEvent event) {
64:         NPC npc = event.getNPC();
65:         if (!npc.hasTrait(PvPBotTrait.class)) return;
66: 
67:         EntityDeathEvent bukkitEvent = event.getEvent();
68:         String botName = npc.getName();
69: 
70:         Location respawnLocation = spawnLocations.remove(npc.getId());
71:         if (respawnLocation == null || respawnLocation.getWorld() == null) {
72:             Location storedLocation = npc.getStoredLocation();
73:             respawnLocation = storedLocation == null ? null : storedLocation.clone();
74:         }
75:         if (respawnLocation == null || respawnLocation.getWorld() == null) {
76:             respawnLocation = bukkitEvent.getEntity().getLocation().clone();
77:         }
78: 
79:         if (respawnLocation == null || respawnLocation.getWorld() == null) {
80:             plugin.getLogger().warning("Cannot respawn " + botName + " (ID: " + npc.getId()
81:                     + "): no valid death or stored location.");
82:             npc.destroy();
83:             return;
84:         }
85: 
86:         int oldId = npc.getId();
87:         npc.destroy();
88: 
89:         final Location finalLoc = respawnLocation;
90:         new BukkitRunnable() {
91:             @Override
92:             public void run() {
93:                 NPC replacement = CitizensAPI.getNPCRegistry().createNPC(EntityType.PLAYER, botName);
94:                 replacement.data().set(NPC.Metadata.REMOVE_FROM_PLAYERLIST, false);
95:                 replacement.data().set(NPC.Metadata.REMOVE_FROM_TABLIST, false);
96:                 replacement.data().set(NPC.Metadata.NAMEPLATE_VISIBLE, true);
97:                 replacement.addTrait(PvPBotTrait.class);
98: 
99:                 boolean spawned = replacement.spawn(finalLoc);
100:                 if (!spawned) {
101:                     plugin.getLogger().warning("Failed to respawn " + botName + " after death. Old NPC ID: "
102:                             + oldId + ", new NPC ID: " + replacement.getId() + ", location: "
103:                             + formatLocation(finalLoc));
104:                     replacement.destroy();
105:                     return;
106:                 }
107: 
108:                 if (replacement.getEntity() instanceof Player player) {
109:                     AttributeInstance maxHealth = player.getAttribute(Attribute.MAX_HEALTH);
110:                     if (maxHealth != null) {
111:                         player.setHealth(maxHealth.getValue());
112:                     }
113:                     player.setFoodLevel(20);
114:                     player.setFireTicks(0);
115:                     player.setFallDistance(0.0F);
116:                     player.setNoDamageTicks(10);
117:                 }
118: 
119:             }
120:         }.runTaskLater(plugin, 10);
121:     }
122: 
123:     @EventHandler
124:     public void onEntityDamageByEntity(EntityDamageByEntityEvent event) {
125:         if (!(event.getDamager() instanceof Player attacker)) return;
126:         if (attacker.getGameMode() == GameMode.CREATIVE || attacker.getGameMode() == GameMode.SPECTATOR) return;
127:         if (!CitizensAPI.getNPCRegistry().isNPC(event.getEntity())) return;
128:         NPC npc = CitizensAPI.getNPCRegistry().getNPC(event.getEntity());
129:         if (!npc.hasTrait(PvPBotTrait.class)) return;
130: 
131:         PvPBotTrait trait = npc.getTraitNullable(PvPBotTrait.class);
132:         if (trait != null) {
133:             trait.setTarget(attacker);
134:         }
135:     }
136: 
137:     private String formatLocation(Location location) {
138:         return location.getWorld().getName() + " "
139:                 + location.getBlockX() + ","
140:                 + location.getBlockY() + ","
141:                 + location.getBlockZ();
142:     }
143: }

15:         if (currentTarget == null) return null;

23:         if (tickCounter - lastDamageTick > 200 && distSq > meleeRangeSq) return null;

1: // Phase 3: Core Melee Combat AI вҖ” Pursuit Navigation, Bunny Hop & Idle Wander
2: package com.khoablabla.pvpbot.movement;
3: 
4: import net.citizensnpcs.api.npc.NPC;
5: 
6: import org.bukkit.Location;
7: import org.bukkit.entity.LivingEntity;
8: import org.bukkit.entity.Player;
9: import org.bukkit.util.Vector;
10: 
11: import com.khoablabla.pvpbot.utils.SafeLocationFinder;
12: 
13: import java.util.Random;
14: 
15: public class BotMovementController {
16: 
17:     private int lastBHopTick = 0;
18:     private final Random random = new Random();
19: 
20:     public void handleMovement(NPC npc, LivingEntity target, int currentTick, boolean isJumping) {
21:         if (npc.getEntity() == null) return;
22: 
23:         if (isJumping) return;
24: 
25:         npc.getNavigator().setTarget(target, true);
26: 
27:         if (!(npc.getEntity() instanceof Player botPlayer)) return;
28:         if (currentTick - lastBHopTick < 20) return;
29:         lastBHopTick = currentTick;
30: 
31:         if (botPlayer.getLocation().distance(target.getLocation()) <= 5.0) return;
32: 
33:         Location below = botPlayer.getLocation().subtract(0, 0.01, 0);
34:         if (below.getBlock().isSolid()) {
35:             Vector currentVel = botPlayer.getVelocity();
36:             botPlayer.setVelocity(new Vector(currentVel.getX(), 0.42, currentVel.getZ()));
37:         }
38:     }
39: 
40:     public void handleIdleWander(NPC npc) {
41:         if (!(npc.getEntity() instanceof Player botPlayer)) return;
42:         if (npc.getNavigator().isNavigating()) return;
43: 
44:         Location origin = botPlayer.getLocation();
45:         for (int attempt = 0; attempt < 5; attempt++) {
46:             double dx = (random.nextDouble() - 0.5) * 10;
47:             double dz = (random.nextDouble() - 0.5) * 10;
48:             Location candidate = origin.clone().add(dx, 0, dz);
49:             Location safe = SafeLocationFinder.findSafeLocation(candidate);
50:             if (safe != null) {
51:                 npc.getNavigator().setTarget(safe);
52:                 return;
53:             }
54:         }
55:     }
56: }

(End of file - total 56 lines)

1: // Phase 3: Core Melee Combat AI вҖ” Melee Attack Loop & Tick-Based Jump Crit State Machine
2: package com.khoablabla.pvpbot.combat;
3: 
4: import net.citizensnpcs.api.npc.NPC;
5: 
6: import org.bukkit.Location;
7: import org.bukkit.Particle;
8: import org.bukkit.entity.LivingEntity;
9: import org.bukkit.entity.Player;
10: import org.bukkit.util.Vector;
11: 
12: public class MeleeAttackController {
13: 
14:     private int cooldownTicks = 0;
15:     private int jumpTicks = -1;
16:     private boolean criticalsEnabled = true;
17: 
18:     private static final double ATTACK_RANGE = 3.5;
19:     private static final double JUMP_VELOCITY = 0.42;
20:     private static final int SWORD_COOLDOWN = 12;
21:     private static final double NORMAL_DAMAGE = 2.0;
22:     private static final double CRITICAL_DAMAGE = 4.0;
23: 
24:     public boolean isJumping() {
25:         return jumpTicks >= 0;
26:     }
27: 
28:     public void handleAttack(NPC npc, LivingEntity target) {
29:         if (cooldownTicks > 0) cooldownTicks--;
30: 
31:         if (!(npc.getEntity() instanceof Player botPlayer)) return;
32: 
33:         if (jumpTicks >= 0) {
34:             jumpTicks++;
35:             if (jumpTicks == 5) {
36:                 executeStrike(botPlayer, target, true);
37:             }
38:             if (jumpTicks >= 8) {
39:                 jumpTicks = -1;
40:                 cooldownTicks = SWORD_COOLDOWN;
41:             }
42:             return;
43:         }
44: 
45:         double dist = botPlayer.getLocation().distance(target.getLocation());
46:         if (dist > ATTACK_RANGE) return;
47: 
48:         if (cooldownTicks > 0) return;
49: 
50:         if (criticalsEnabled) {
51:             Location below = botPlayer.getLocation().subtract(0, 0.01, 0);
52:             if (!below.getBlock().isSolid()) return;
53: 
54:             Vector currentVel = botPlayer.getVelocity();
55:             botPlayer.setVelocity(new Vector(currentVel.getX(), JUMP_VELOCITY, currentVel.getZ()));
56:             npc.getNavigator().cancelNavigation();
57:             jumpTicks = 0;
58:         } else {
59:             executeStrike(botPlayer, target, false);
60:             cooldownTicks = SWORD_COOLDOWN;
61:         }
62:     }
63: 
64:     private void executeStrike(Player botPlayer, LivingEntity target, boolean critical) {
65:         Location targetLoc = target.getLocation().add(0, 1, 0);
66:         if (critical) {
67:             target.getWorld().spawnParticle(Particle.CRIT, targetLoc, 15, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.1);
68:         }
69:         botPlayer.swingMainHand();
70:         target.damage(critical ? CRITICAL_DAMAGE : NORMAL_DAMAGE, botPlayer);
71:     }
72: }

(End of file - total 72 lines)
</content>

3. **Дҗб»•i sang chбәҝ Д‘б»ҷ Sinh tб»“n (`/gamemode survival`) vГ  chГ©m bot** -> XГЎc nhбәӯn: Bot lбәӯp tб»©c Д‘uб»•i theo chГ©m bбәЎn.
4. **Khi bot Д‘uб»•i chГ©m bбәЎn** -> Quan sГЎt kб»№ cГә nhбәЈy cб»§a bot: Bot nhбәЈy lГӘn ГЎp sГЎt mЖ°б»Јt mГ  khГҙng bб»Ӣ khб»ұng, vГ  cГә nhбәЈy Crit bб»• xuб»‘ng chГ©m bбәЎn rЖЎi xuб»‘ng Д‘бәҘt vГҙ cГ№ng tб»ұ nhiГӘn, KHГ”NG bao giб»қ bб»Ӣ kбә№t lЖЎ lб»ӯng giб»Ҝa trб»қi hб»Үt nhЖ° trong video lб»—i trЖ°б»ӣc (Jump State Machine hoбәЎt Д‘б»ҷng).

+### 1. MeleeAttackController.java вҖ” Jump State Machine Analysis
+
+**Lines 14-16: State Variables**
+```java
+private int cooldownTicks = 0;
+private int jumpTicks = -1;        // -1 = idle, 0..8 = jumping sequence
+private boolean criticalsEnabled = true;
+```
+вң… **Good**: `jumpTicks = -1` correctly represents idle state. Range 0-8 for jump sequence.
+
+**Lines 33-43: Jump State Machine Execution**
+```java
+if (jumpTicks >= 0) {
+    jumpTicks++;
+    if (jumpTicks == 5) {
+        executeStrike(botPlayer, target, true);
+    }
+    if (jumpTicks >= 8) {
+        jumpTicks = -1;
+        cooldownTicks = SWORD_COOLDOWN;
+    }
+    return;
+}
+```
+вҡ пёҸ **ISSUE FOUND**: State machine allows `jumpTicks` to reach 8, but `isJumping()` returns `true` for ALL values >= 0. This means:
+- Tick 0: jump starts, `isJumping()` = true
+- Tick 1-4: ascending, `isJumping()` = true  
+- Tick 5: strike executes, `isJumping()` = true
+- Tick 6-7: descending, `isJumping()` = true
+- Tick 8: reset to -1, `isJumping()` = false
+
+**Problem**: The bot's velocity is set at tick 0, but Citizens Navigator may override velocity on ticks 1-7 if Navigator is still active. The `cancelNavigation()` is called at tick 0 (line 56), but if the NPC's Navigator re-engages or if the entity's physics tick happens before Navigator cancellation takes effect, there's a 1-tick window where Navigator can override the jump velocity.
+
+**Lines 51-57: Jump Initiation**
+```java
+Location below = botPlayer.getLocation().subtract(0, 0.01, 0);
+if (!below.getBlock().isSolid()) return;
+
+Vector currentVel = botPlayer.getVelocity();
+botPlayer.setVelocity(new Vector(currentVel.getX(), JUMP_VELOCITY, currentVel.getZ()));
+npc.getNavigator().cancelNavigation();
+jumpTicks = 0;
+```
+вң… **Good**: Checks solid block below before jumping. Preserves X/Z momentum.
+
+**Lines 38-42: isJumping() Guard**
+```java
+public boolean isJumping() {
+    return jumpTicks >= 0;
+}
+```
+вң… **Good**: Used in BotMovementController to skip navigation.

+            return;

+    }
+}

+    }
+}
+```

+- GameMode filter in run loop (additional safety)
+- Calls `attackController.handleAttack` FIRST, then `movementController.handleMovement` with `isJumping()` result

+### 5. CombatTargetSelector.java вҖ” Target Validation
+
+```java
+public static LivingEntity validateTarget(NPC npc, double range, LivingEntity currentTarget, int tickCounter, int lastDamageTick) {
+    if (currentTarget == null) return null;
+    if (currentTarget.isDead() || !currentTarget.isValid()) return null;
+    if (!(npc.getEntity() instanceof LivingEntity botEntity)) return null;
+
+    double distSq = botEntity.getLocation().distanceSquared(currentTarget.getLocation());
+    if (distSq > range * range) return null;
+
+    double meleeRangeSq = 3.0 * 3.0;
+    if (tickCounter - lastDamageTick > 200 && distSq > meleeRangeSq) return null;
+
+    return currentTarget;
+}
+```
+вң… **Good**: Validates target existence, range, and aggro timeout (200 ticks = 10 seconds without damage while > melee range).

+### 3.3.3 Critical Findings вҖ” Root Causes of Hovering Bug
+
+#### ROOT CAUSE 1: Jump State Machine Timing Gap (MeleeAttackController)
+**Location**: `MeleeAttackController.java` lines 33-43
+**Severity**: HIGH
+**Description**: The `jumpTicks` state machine runs from 0 to 8. `isJumping()` returns `true` for all values `>= 0`. However:
+- At tick 0: `jumpTicks = 0`, velocity set, `cancelNavigation()` called
+- Ticks 1-7: `jumpTicks` = 1-7, `isJumping()` = true, `BotMovementController` skips navigation
+- **GAP**: If the NPC's physics tick processes BEFORE the `runTaskLater` or if the Navigator re-engages before the tick completes, there's a window where the entity can float.
+
+**Root Cause**: The state machine relies on `jumpTicks` reaching 8 to reset. If the bot lands before tick 8 (hits ground early), `jumpTicks` continues counting but the entity is already on ground. The state machine doesn't detect early landing.
+
+#### ROOT CAUSE 2: BotMovementController B-Hop Ground Check Precision
+**Location**: `BotMovementController.java` line 33
+```java
+Location below = botPlayer.getLocation().subtract(0, 0.01, 0);
+```
+**Problem**: `subtract(0, 0.01, 0)` checks 0.01 blocks below entity origin. For a Player entity (eye height ~1.62), the feet are at Y-1.62. Checking at Y-0.01 checks the block at entity center, NOT below feet. This can cause:
+- False positive (block detected when feet are in air)
+- False negative (no block detected when standing on block)
+
+#### ROOT CAUSE 3: Missing Early Landing Detection
+**Location**: `MeleeAttackController.java` lines 33-43
+The state machine has no mechanism to detect early landing. If the bot hits a ceiling or lands on a higher block before tick 8, it continues the jump sequence but the entity is already on ground, causing floating behavior.
+
+#### ROOT CAUSE 4: Respawn UUID Conflict (Potential)
+**Location**: `PlayerSimulationListener.java` lines 86-99
+```java
+npc.destroy();  // Old NPC destroyed
+// ... 10 ticks later ...
+NPC replacement = CitizensAPI.getNPCRegistry().createNPC(EntityType.PLAYER, botName);
+```
+**Risk**: If the 10-tick delay isn't enough for Citizens to fully clean up the old NPC's UUID from the registry/world, the new NPC might get a conflicting UUID or the old entity might not be fully removed.
+

+

parts.text:
# рҹҡЁ CRITICAL DIRECTIVE: DEEP CODE AUDITING & LINE-BY-LINE VERIFICATION FOR NPC HOVERING BUG

## 1. Objective
Despite Phase 3.2 compilation passing, the Project Owner reports that the PvPBot still exhibits residual hovering, floating, or flying behaviors ("bay bay") in mid-air during combat. 
You are strictly ordered to run an **extremely deep, line-by-line audit** of all newly modified files. Locate every logical gap, physics conflict, or loop bypass that causes the bot to float, double-jump, or get suspended.

## 2. Strict Constraints
- Do NOT modify any Java source files inside `src/` [2].
- Your output must be a highly detailed, line-by-line diagnostic report.
- Do NOT wipe `report.md` [2]. You must preserve all previous completed tasks, mark them as `[x]`, and append your deep audit findings at the bottom under Section 6 (CГҒC Lб»–I PHГҒT SINH KHГҒC) [2].

## 3. Specific Diagnostic Areas to Scan & Audit

### Area 1: Citizens Navigator Conflict during Bunny-Hop (`BotMovementController.java`)
- Read the B-hop pursuit code block in `BotMovementController.java`.
- Inspect whether Citizens Navigator is still actively ticking and overriding the NPC's position/velocity while a B-hop jump is triggered [1.1.2].
- Is `npc.getNavigator().cancelNavigation()` or an explicit path pause ever invoked when a B-hop Y-velocity is applied? If not, identify why this causes Spigot physics and Citizens pathfinding to fight, resulting in mid-air hovering.

### Area 2: The Fixed-Tick Jump Limit Defect (`MeleeAttackController.java`)
- Read the `jumpTicks` state machine inside `MeleeAttackController.java`.
- Inspect the landing trigger: `if (jumpTicks >= 8) { jumpTicks = -1; }`.
- **Analyze this critical edge case:** What happens if the bot jumps from a ledge, a stair, or is knocked back into the air, causing the physical fall time to exceed 8 ticks? 
- If `jumpTicks` resets to `-1` while the bot is still physically in mid-air, will the bot immediately trigger a new critical jump on the very next tick? Identify how this creates endless double-jumping/floating behaviors and how to prevent it by verifying solid ground *before* resetting `jumpTicks` to `-1`.

### Area 3: Navigator Cache Persistence
- When `MeleeAttackController.isJumping()` is true, `BotMovementController` skips setting a new target. 
- However, does skipping `setTarget()` actually stop the Citizens Navigator if a path was *already* calculated and active? Or does the Navigator continue to force-navigate the bot behind the scenes? Identify if we need to call `npc.getNavigator().cancelNavigation()` explicitly on every tick a jump is active.

## 4. Output Requirements
- Execute `./build.sh` to check for compilation consistency.
- Write a highly technical, line-by-line diagnostic report in `report.md` Section 6 (CГҒC Lб»–I PHГҒT SINH KHГҒC).
- For each bug found:
  1. Specify the file and the exact line number.
  2. Explain the exact physics/logic mechanism causing the bot to hover.
  3. Propose the precise, bulletproof code fix.
- Lower the task completion rate in Section 7 to **80%** as a strict warning that physics stability is compromised.

The user is asking me to do a deep audit of the code for NPC hovering/floating bugs. They want me to:
1. Not modify any Java files (read-only audit)
2. Run build.sh to check compilation
3. Write a detailed line-by-line audit report in report.md Section 6
4. Lower completion rate to 80% in Section 7

Let me first read the current state of the relevant files to do the audit.

48:             Location candidate = origin.clone().add(dx, 0, dz);

51:                 npc.getNavigator().setTarget(safe);

53:             }

55:     }

1: // Phase 3: Core Melee Combat AI вҖ” Melee Attack Loop & Tick-Based Jump Crit State Machine
2: package com.khoablabla.pvpbot.combat;
3: 
4: import net.citizensnpcs.api.npc.NPC;
5: 
6: import org.bukkit.Location;
7: import org.bukkit.Particle;
8: import org.bukkit.entity.LivingEntity;
9: import org.bukkit.entity.Player;
10: import org.bukkit.util.Vector;
11: 
12: public class MeleeAttackController {
13: 
14:     private int cooldownTicks = 0;
15:     private int jumpTicks = -1;
16:     private boolean criticalsEnabled = true;
17: 
18:     private static final double ATTACK_RANGE = 3.5;
19:     private static final double JUMP_VELOCITY = 0.42;
20:     private static final int SWORD_COOLDOWN = 12;
21:     private static final double NORMAL_DAMAGE = 2.0;
22:     private static final double CRITICAL_DAMAGE = 4.0;
23: 
24:     public boolean isJumping() {
25:         return jumpTicks >= 0;
26:     }
27: 
28:     public void handleAttack(NPC npc, LivingEntity target) {
29:         if (cooldownTicks > 0) cooldownTicks--;
30: 
31:         if (!(npc.getEntity() instanceof Player botPlayer)) return;
32: 
33:         if (jumpTicks >= 0) {
34:             jumpTicks++;
35:             if (jumpTicks == 5) {
36:                 executeStrike(botPlayer, target, true);
37:             }
38:             if (jumpTicks >= 8) {
39:                 jumpTicks = -1;
40:                 cooldownTicks = SWORD_COOLDOWN;
41:             }
42:             return;
43:         }
44: 
45:         double dist = botPlayer.getLocation().distance(target.getLocation());
46:         if (dist > ATTACK_RANGE) return;
47: 
48:         if (cooldownTicks > 0) return;
49: 
50:         if (criticalsEnabled) {
51:             Location below = botPlayer.getLocation().subtract(0, 0.01, 0);
52:             if (!below.getBlock().isSolid()) return;
53: 
54:             Vector currentVel = botPlayer.getVelocity();
55:             botPlayer.setVelocity(new Vector(currentVel.getX(), JUMP_VELOCITY, currentVel.getZ()));
56:             npc.getNavigator().cancelNavigation();
57:             jumpTicks = 0;
58:         } else {
59:             executeStrike(botPlayer, target, false);
60:             cooldownTicks = SWORD_COOLDOWN;
61:         }
62:     }
63: 
64:     private void executeStrike(Player botPlayer, LivingEntity target, boolean critical) {
65:         Location targetLoc = target.getLocation().add(0, 1, 0);
66:         if (critical) {
67:             target.getWorld().spawnParticle(Particle.CRIT, targetLoc, 15, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.1);
68:         }
69:         botPlayer.swingMainHand();
70:         target.damage(critical ? CRITICAL_DAMAGE : NORMAL_DAMAGE, botPlayer);
71:     }
72: }

(End of file - total 72 lines)
</content>

94:                 replacement.data().set(NPC.Metadata.REMOVE_FROM_PLAYERLIST, false);
95:                 replacement.data().set(NPC.Metadata.REMOVE_FROM_TABLIST, false);
96:                 replacement.data().set(NPC.Metadata.NAMEPLATE_VISIBLE, true);
97:                 replacement.addTrait(PvPBotTrait.class);
98: 
99:                 boolean spawned = replacement.spawn(finalLoc);
100:                 if (!spawned) {
101:                     plugin.getLogger().warning("Failed to respawn " + botName + " after death. Old NPC ID: "
102:                             + oldId + ", new NPC ID: " + replacement.getId() + ", location: "
103:                             + formatLocation(finalLoc));
104:                     replacement.destroy();
105:                     return;
106:                 }
107: 
108:                 if (replacement.getEntity() instanceof Player player) {
109:                     AttributeInstance maxHealth = player.getAttribute(Attribute.MAX_HEALTH);
110:                     if (maxHealth != null) {
111:                         player.setHealth(maxHealth.getValue());
112:                     }
113:                     player.setFoodLevel(20);
114:                     player.setFireTicks(0);
115:                     player.setFallDistance(0.0F);
116:                     player.setNoDamageTicks(10);
117:                 }
118: 
119:             }
120:         }.runTaskLater(plugin, 10);
121:     }
122: 
123:     @EventHandler
124:     public void onEntityDamageByEntity(EntityDamageByEntityEvent event) {
125:         if (!(event.getDamager() instanceof Player attacker)) return;
126:         if (attacker.getGameMode() == GameMode.CREATIVE || attacker.getGameMode() == GameMode.SPECTATOR) return;
127:         if (!CitizensAPI.getNPCRegistry().isNPC(event.getEntity())) return;
128:         NPC npc = CitizensAPI.getNPCRegistry().getNPC(event.getEntity());
129:         if (!npc.hasTrait(PvPBotTrait.class)) return;
130: 
131:         PvPBotTrait trait = npc.getTraitNullable(PvPBotTrait.class);
132:         if (trait != null) {
133:             trait.setTarget(attacker);
134:         }
135:     }
136: 
137:     private String formatLocation(Location location) {
138:         return location.getWorld().getName() + " "
139:                 + location.getBlockX() + ","
140:                 + location.getBlockY() + ","
141:                 + location.getBlockZ();
142:     }
143: }

(End of file - total 143 lines)
</content>
